steps.prompt: Feelings have names — and you can write them! Find sad and trace it!
steps.feedback: Sad. Everyone feels sad sometimes — and now you can write it. Find happy!
Happy! Five letters for a wonderful feeling. Find angry!
Angry. A big feeling — five letters. Find calm!
Calm. Four quiet letters. Last one — find scared!
Scared! Six letters — you can write that feeling now. sad, happy, angry, calm, scared — every feeling has a word!
